title: Support --http-proxy for remote builds
body:
* Fix misspelled parameter
 * Add http-proxy support for builds
 * Sorted fields in query struct to aid in visual scan of fields

http_proxy must be set in the podman.service unit file, for example
Environment=http_proxy=<value>

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [jwhonce] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Test, after adding `Environment=http_proxy=localhost` to podman.service unit file.  See #7859.

```
$ bin/podman-remote build --http-proxy /tmp

STEP 2: RUN printenv http_proxy
```
